agents.name: build
agents.description: The default agent. Executes tools based on configured permissions.

agents.name: plan
agents.description: Plan mode. Disallows all edit tools.

turns.prompt: Create a file called /tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt with the text 'hello world'

events.text: The user wants me to create a simple file with specific content. This is straightforward - I'll use the write tool to create the file.

events.content: You must read file /tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt before overwriting it. Use the Read tool first

events.text: The file doesn't exist yet, so I need to check if it exists first. Let me try reading it, and if it doesn't exist, I'll create it.

events.content:
<path>/tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: goodbye world

(End of file - total 1 lines)
</content>

metadata.diff:
Index: /tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt
===================================================================
--- /tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt
+++ /tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt
@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
-goodbye world
\ No newline at end of file
+hello world
\ No newline at end of file

events.text: The file exists with "goodbye world", so I need to write "hello world" to it.
I had to read the file first because it already existed. Now it's been written with the new content.
Done. The file now contains 'hello world'.

turns.prompt: Edit the file /tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt and change 'hello' to 'goodbye'

events.text: The user wants me to edit the file to change 'hello' to 'goodbye'. I just read it so I can now edit it.
